summary: W918 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while replacing W917's MetrizableBoundedExactWeakEquivalenceTriangleCompletionInputW654 field with the raw source-side triangle-completion proposition. It reconstructs the W917 assumption through triangleCompletionOfRawFieldW918, then projects back through W917 into the stable ExactAt route. Product success remains false because the W918 route fields are still assumptions and the original four-task completion witness and review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W918 exposes the W654 triangle-completion input as a raw proposition, but the remaining W918 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W918 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W918 fields include raw WPP-limit boundary propositions, raw relation-pullback and target-relation-lift condition propositions, raw target surjectivity and compactness propositions, raw selected-difference pi1/pi2/pi3 projection closed-map propositions, the raw mapped explicit cokernel IsClosedMap field, strict preimage object and map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, raw fixed-target uniqueness quantifier fields, source pretriangulated/triangulated fields, endpoint closed-embedding/open-map/ExactAt-to-epi facts, and bounded-homotopy localized right-adjoint fields.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the thirty-nine W918 closed-map triangle-completion-raw-field boundary-raw-fields explicit inputs.

Choose the next smallest contract-closing increment from source-image normalization, strict-preimage coherence consolidation, branch selection, endpoint facts, localized-right-adjoint data, or another supported concrete provider boundary.
Connect a real no-argument route to the original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real rather than merely exposed as fields.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
